title: Make Contact Us and Our Services buttons translucent

requirements.summary: Update Hero section CTA buttons to have translucent/frosted glass appearance with backdrop-blur effect
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Contact Us' button in the Hero section has a semi-transparent background with backdrop-blur styling.
The 'Our Services' button in the Hero section has a semi-transparent background with backdrop-blur styling.
Both buttons retain legible text with sufficient contrast against the hero background.
Both buttons have visible hover/focus states consistent with the maritime theme.
The frosted/translucent styling does not break the existing layout or responsiveness on mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Update the 'Contact Us' and 'Our Services' CTA buttons to apply translucent/frosted glass styling. Replace the current solid background classes with semi-transparent backgrounds (e.g., bg-white/20 or bg-navy-900/30), add backdrop-blur-md for the frosted effect, include a subtle border (e.g., border border-white/30), and ensure text color provides sufficient contrast (e.g., text-white with font-semibold). Preserve existing hover states and adjust hover effects to maintain the translucent appearance (e.g., hover:bg-white/30 or hover:bg-navy-900/40). Verify the buttons remain fully legible against the hero background image and gradient overlay on both mobile and desktop viewports.
